    labelCounter attack! - Part 17 (0-0)
    titleCounter attack! - Part 17
    typekill
    completeDescriptionAdmiral McArthur: “That wasn’t too bad.. actually. Next it’s time to test the capability of the Nexar units stationed inside the first circle. Engage and take out 15 of them. The valid targets are Nexar Tank, Nexar Fighter and Nexar Projector.“
    solarsystemsfNQWazDdUasynuRWngLdw
    availableYes
    drop88qMIotyIkWBTuUav5IDsA
    bitmapQnZuhDxX6EeNzX0N7EddbA
    descriptionAdmiral McArthur: “Their defences does indeed look impressive. A five layered onion.. each layer protected by a force field barrier. Each force field does only have one entrance and it’s very heavily defended by bases sporting those nasty Heavy Weave Generators. Let’s try to break through the front gate. Start by taking out the 5 bases closes to the entrance.
    value5
